ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "tripduration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "bikeid" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "birthyear" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (1: Male, 2: Female) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES start_stations ("start_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bikeid FOREIGN KEY ("bikeid") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES end_stations ("end_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the bike */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance date for the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the bike */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the station is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "start_stations" (
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each start station */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the trip started */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the start station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the start station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("start_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "end_stations" (
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each end station */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the trip ended */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the end station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the end station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("end_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "birthyear" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (1: Male, 2: Female) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_bikes" (
  "trip_bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip-bike combination */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_bikes_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_bikes_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_start_stations" (
  "trip_start_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip-start station combination */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_start_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_start_stations_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_start_stations_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES start_stations ("start_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_end_stations" (
  "trip_end_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip-end station combination */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_end_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_end_stations_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_end_stations_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES end_stations ("end_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance or repair */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance or repair performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance or repair */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance or repair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike the component belongs to */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_components_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "component_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_status" (
  "bike_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike status */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Use, In Maintenance) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_status" (
  "station_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station status */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., Open, Closed, Under Maintenance) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_bikes" (
  "users_bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-bike combination */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("users_bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_bikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_bikes_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_stations" (
  "users_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-station combination */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("users_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_stations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_stations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_promotions" (
  "user_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-promotion combination */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_promotions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
